title: glechoma × pannonica
intro: Glechoma × pannonica, also known as Hungarian mint or lemon balm mint, is a hybrid of the Glechoma hederacea and Mentha pannonica plants. This perennial herb is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Glechoma × pannonica include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reduce anxiety and stress, and support the immune system. Glechoma × pannonica is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
